<style type="text/css" media="all">.notification-banner .desc {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.3rem;
}
body.gov {
  header.gov-site-header {
  margin-bottom: 0;
    .navbar-row {
      margin-bottom: 0;
    }
}
.feature-teaser {
  background-color: #F5F5F5;
  padding: 1.5em;
  height:100%;
}
.feature-teaser.ft-blue {
  background-color: #52BFFF;
  color:#333;
}
.feature-teaser h1 {
  font-size: 2em;
}
.feature-teaser h1 strong {
  font-weight: bold;
}
